news.summary: The US has relocated 15 aircraft, including refuelling tankers, from military bases in southern Spain.

news.headline: China’s war on corruption – is this just the end of the beginning?
news.summary: In the run-up to this year’s ‘two sessions’ – the annual meetings of China’s top legislature and political advisory body – high-level policymakers have stressed the need to defuse financial risks and root out political corruption, two of President Xi Jinping’s long-term priorities. news.headline: Travellers stranded, airlines under pressure as Iran war escalates
news.summary: Thousands are stranded as major Gulf hubs, including Dubai, remain closed or severely restricted for a fourth day.

news.headline: What we know about the deadly strike on a primary school in Iran
news.summary: Iran held a mass funeral this Tuesday for at least 165 schoolgirls killed Saturday in a strike on Minab. But online, some users claim the tragedy was staged by Iranian authorities.
